purpose: Ground truth for testing document segmentation on the Amendment #3 manufacturing agreement sample.
notes: This ground truth is written from the document structure, not copied mechanically from current segmenter output.
The document has a long introductory recital section followed by numbered amendment sections 1 through 9.
Inline numbered sections must be detected even when they appear inside a long line.
Calendar years such as 2018, 2019, and 2017 must not be treated as section numbers.
Confidential treatment legends, page initials, and exhibit/footer artifacts should not create legal clause segments.

segments.description: Introductory confidential legend, amendment title, parties, background recitals, and NOW THEREFORE lead-in.

must_contain: shall have the meaning as set out in the Agreement

segments.description: Supply terms amendment, updated supply plan, minimum volume, and liquidated damages language.
must_not_contain: 2019. Attached hereto as Exhibit A is a detailed supply plan
special_assertions: The year 2019 must remain inside section 2 and must not become a separate numbered section.

segments.description: Immediate termination right if FDA warning letter status affects supply.
must_not_contain: 4. In the event of a non-conformance

segments.description: Source Plasma non-conformance, damage, loss, and no compensation for unproduced batch.
segments.starts_with: 4. In the event of a non-conformance
must_contain: Sanofi Pasteur shall not be responsible

segments.description: Seven million USD compensation fee, installment schedule, invoicing address, and full compensation language.
must_contain: Sanofi Pasteur SA DSFF Pole de Lyon
ADMA declares that the Compensation Fee is fair and equitable

segments.expected_title_contains: full payment of the Compensation Fee
segments.description: Mutual release after full payment of the compensation fee.
Amendment to Section 6.5, risk of loss, limitation of liability, liability cap, and exclusion of consequential damages.
segments.starts_with: 7. The Parties further agree to amend Section 6.5
must_contain: incidental, indirect, special and consequential or punitive damages
gross negligence or the willful misconduct
must_not_contain: 8. The Parties further agree to amend that certain Quality and Technical Agreement

segments.description: Amendment to the Quality Agreement regarding Source Plasma storage address and consistency with Amendment #3.
segments.starts_with: 8. The Parties further agree to amend that certain Quality and Technical Agreement
must_contain: within 60 days after the Amendment Effective Date

segments.description: Other terms remain effective, witness clause, signatures, names, titles, and dates.
must_contain: shall remain in full force and effect

global_must_not_create_segments_for: ADMA Initials ___ Sanofi Pasteur Initials ___ A-1
